MINI MINUTES: Appearances: john n. dahlberg, esq., dillingham & murphy, 415.397.2700, for plaintiff safeway inc.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling after counsel for plaintiff shows proof of personal service of order to show cause on derrick johnson. plaintiff safeway inc.'s motion for Preliminary Injunction is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
